A crystal formed from condensed World Tree energy.

name: Water Grenade

A Water Grenade useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing Water damage to enemies.

name: Water Radiant Gem
description:
A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body.
When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Water Pals.

name: Wheat
description:
An ingredient that forms the base of various dishes.
Wheat is a common crop in many parts of the world.

name: Wheat Seeds
description:
Seeds that produce Wheat.
Necessary for starting a farm.
Can be purchased from a merchant.

name: Wine
description: Wine

name: Wing Cell
description: The fuel required to power the Wing Pack.

name: Wing Pack
description:
A portable glider that enables flight. 
Consumes Wing Cell to propel the user through the skies.

name: Wire Fence Schematic
description: When in inventory or stored in a base, allows you to build Wire Fence.

name: Wistella Bounty Token
description: Proof of defeating [Wistella, Mantle of the Night Sky]. Simply possessing it permanently increases the stats of the Pals in your team.

name: Witch Hat Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Witch Hat (Common).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Witch Hat Schematic 2
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Witch Hat (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Witch Hat Schematic 3
description:

Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Witch Hat Schematic 4
description:

name: Witch's Crown
description:
Imbued with the ominous power of Bellanoir Libero (Ultra).
A rarity only the most fortunate may obtain.

name: Wixen Bounty Token
description: Proof of defeating [Wixen, Fire-Licked Furball]. Simply possessing it permanently increases the stats of the Pals in your team.

name: Wood
description:
Material for structures and items.
Can be obtained by cutting trees.

name: Wooden Barricade Schematic
description: When in inventory or stored in a base, allows you to build Wooden Barricade.

name: Wooden Board
description:
Planks made from processed wood for easier use.
More versatile than raw logs, with a wide variety of uses.
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Wooden Club
description:
A Wooden Club for close range combat.
Can beat a small Pal to a pulp if need be.

name: Wool
description:
Material sheared from sheep Pals.
A necessity for creating bedding, Cloth and more.

name: World Tree Holy Water
description:
Sacred water brimming with the energy of the World Tree.
It purifies all things and awakens latent powers.
When consumed, World Tree resources will not vanish when approached for a period of time.

name: Wumpo Botan Bounty Token
description: Proof of defeating [Wumpo Botan, Guardian of the Grassy Fields]. Simply possessing it permanently increases the stats of the Pals in your team.

name: Wumpo Botan Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Wumpo Botan.

name: Wumpo Charm
description:
An accessory with incredible resistance to cold. 
Greatly reduces incoming Ice damage.

description:
Slab depicting Xenolord.
Offer to a Summoning Altar
to summon an inconceivably powerful Lv?? Xenolord.

description:
Fragment overflowing with Xenolord's energy.
Combine all of them to create a Slab.

name: Xenolord Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Xenolord.

Players can enhance their abilities by offering them to a certain statue.

name: Yakumo Statue Schematic
description: When in inventory or stored in a base, allows you to build Yakumo Statue.

name: Zenara Hat
description:
Dress up like Zenara using this special headpiece! 
A rarity only the most fortunate may obtain.

name: Zoe Hat
description: Dress up like Zoe using this special headpiece!

name: Zoe's Halloween Costume
description:
A Halloween outfit for Zoe.
She's bound to love it,
so let's give it to her!

name: Zoe's Halloween Costume Schematic
description:
A memo of Zoe's mutterings.
Craft it at a workbench and deliver the finished piece to her.

name: Zoe's Tattered Memento
description:
A worn scrap of fabric with a faint lingering scent. 
To Zoe, it's a treasured reminder of the past.
